name: Metallica
bio: Metallica's catalog remains commercially powerful because the band's biggest recordings bridge metal, mainstream rock, and live-performance culture at global scale.
notable_for: One of the strongest heavy-metal catalogs in long-tail music economics.
career_highlight: The Black Album still drives disproportionate streaming and licensing value decades after release.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from durable metal catalog streaming, physical/reissue demand, touring halo, sync value, and band writer participation.

ownership.master_owner: Mixed label and band-side catalog economics across eras
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to band songwriter participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Heavy catalog depth and reissue demand make the gross-to-artist split more complex than streaming alone.
